title: Fix mixed-intent guide retrieval
description:
Why: /guide currently works for single-intent goals, but combined goals can drop one intent from the retrieved LightRAG context. Example: a combined code-review/TDD/YouTube goal returned YouTube transcript context but missed TDD/test-driven context.

Plan:
1. Add a regression harness for live-style /query payloads covering single-intent and mixed-intent goals.
2. Split user goals into intent phrases, not just individual keywords.
3. Query LightRAG per intent plus a broad combined query, then merge/dedupe context.
4. Cap merged context by response budget while preserving representation from each intent.
5. Deploy and verify against prod with live /query acceptance tests.

Acceptance:
- Mixed goal containing code review, TDD, and YouTube transcript returns context for TDD/test-driven and YouTube/transcript in one response.
- Single-intent YouTube and TDD tests still pass.
- Empty SOUL.md still returns soul_md_gap.
- /health and /ready pass after deploy.
- Fly steady state remains shared-cpu-1x / 1024 MB.
notes: Implemented per-intent LightRAG querying, merged intent-preserving context, added regression tests, deployed to Fly, and verified live mixed-intent acceptance. bd close failed due local beads schema error: column depends_on_id could not be found.

title: Deploy backend to Fly.io
description: Deploy the FastAPI+LightRAG backend to Fly.io. Configure fly.toml in backend/, set production secrets via fly secrets set, use 1x shared-cpu-1x with a persistent volume at /data for graph storage, min_machines_running=1 to avoid cold starts, health check on GET /health. Verify POST /query returns valid responses at the production URL.

title: Write and test guide.md SKILL.md
description: Write the installable SKILL.md for the /guide skill. Frontmatter: required_environment_variables for HERMES_GUIDE_URL and HERMES_GUIDE_API_KEY. Instruction body guides the agent to read ~/.hermes/soul.md, ls ~/.hermes/skills/, ask user for their goal, curl POST /query, and format the response as SOUL.md gaps + recommended skills + quick wins. Test against local backend with three personas: new user, intermediate, advanced.

title: PAS pipeline: fetch and ingest 258+ skills catalog
description: Write a PAS CLI pipeline stage that parses the awesome-hermes-skills README plus official built-in (72) and optional (101) skill manifests. Emit structured JSON per skill (name, description, category, maturity, use cases). Ingest all 258+ entries into LightRAG via POST /ingest. Pin awesome-hermes-skills to a specific commit SHA.

title: PAS pipeline: fetch and ingest official Hermes docs
description: Write a PAS CLI pipeline stage that crawls the hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs sitemap, extracts markdown content per page (tips, learning path, quickstart, developer guides), and POSTs each document to the local backend POST /ingest endpoint. Include Tips & Best Practices and Learning Path as priority pages.

title: Set up LightRAG FastAPI backend with Docker and Makefile
description: Initialize the Python backend with uv, FastAPI, and LightRAG. Implement POST /query (coaching) and POST /ingest (admin) endpoints. Add Docker Compose on port 7842, Makefile lifecycle targets (up/down/logs/status), and .envrc.example. Validate with a local curl test against /query.

title: Write README and publish v0.1.0
description: Write README.md with one-line description, install command (hermes skills install <url>), example output, self-hosting instructions via Docker Compose, and privacy policy (no SOUL.md logging). Host guide.md at a stable versioned public URL (/v1/guide.md). Tag and publish GitHub release v0.1.0.

title: Curate 15 SOUL.md seed examples corpus
description: Hand-select 15 high-quality SOUL.md examples from the Hermes community (Twitter threads, GitHub, blog posts). Cover diverse use cases: coding agent, research agent, business automation, creative work, personal assistant. Store as individual .md files in seed-data/soul-examples/. This is manual curation work, no code required.
